posts.title: "Back in 2019, we knew that Atkinson had changed the form, but we didn't KNOW whether Ciaramella had used the new form or the old form.  It turns out that he had used the old form - the form which required first hand knowledge. "

quotedTweet.content: Back in 2019, we knew that Atkinson had changed the form, but we didn't KNOW whether Ciaramella had used the new form or the old form.  It turns out that he had used the old form - the form which required first hand knowledge.   The copy of Ciaramella form made public excluded

twitter.content: Wow. Ciaramella used the old form, the one that did not allow hearsay. That means the entire impeachment was void ab initio, meaning it was legally dead on arrival. The fact that Atkinson then secretly changed the form and backdated it makes it all exponentially worse.

posts.raw_content:
Original post.

https://patriots.win/p/1ASZR1tBgX/i-dont-know-all-of-the-specifics/

Update:

My father has pneumonia and a high fever.  Everything else looks good for a 94 year old man.  He will be admitted for observation and treatment.  Fortunately, it was not a heart attack or a stroke.  

I am not asking for medical advise or warnings about this medication or that medication, as those types of things have been discussed incessantly on here over the last few years.  

I just wanted to give an update and my heartfelt appreciation for all of the prayers and kind words.

God bless 🙌 you all.
posts.author: Landslide_2020
posts.title: For those that saw my earlier post about my dad being taken to the hospital by ambulance.  Thank you all for your prayers.  Here's an update I received from my sister.
posts.content:
Original post.

https://patriots.win/p/1ASZR1tBgX/i-dont-know-all-of-the-specifics/

Update:

My father has pneumonia and a high fever. Everything else looks good for a 94 year old man. He will be admitted for observation and treatment. Fortunately, it was not a heart attack or a stroke.

I am not asking for medical advise or warnings about this medication or that medication, as those types of things have been discussed incessantly on here over the last few years.

I just wanted to give an update and my heartfelt appreciation for all of the prayers and kind words.

God bless 🙌 you all.
